name: Gary David Armstrong
headline: Partner & Executive Search | Helping law firms de-risk lateral hires through data, due diligence & research | UK, Offshore & International
text: They say that the brightest light comes from a burning bridge and from someone who built a business without a plan B - I can say hand on heart it was for me, the only way to do it.
llm_buyer_type: executive search partner who left Big 4 consulting to go independent
llm_reasoning: First-person account of leaving Big 4 consulting to build own business with no plan B — classic went-independent forcing moment, senior headline (Partner), though the post is somewhat retrospective and motivational rather than expressing current vulnerability.

name: Alexandra Soto
headline: Lazard Group COO, Group Executive
text: An inspiring woman entrepreneur and we wish you every success on your journey. You are strong, resilient, smart and have real values : that will take you very far.
llm_buyer_type: senior executive cheerleading someone else's journey
llm_reasoning: Despite a very senior headline (Lazard Group COO), this is purely a cheerleading comment on someone else's post — no first-person situation, no forcing moment, no expressed need.
